selection_order.why: Planning state, candidate bytes, work-item graph or required entrypoints are inconsistent; repair the control plane before selecting product work.

The frozen evaluation changed a Batch prohibition, adapter, authority, concurrency, Q0 trigger, quality promotion or truth source; freeze v3.23 and create the required v3.24 successor candidate instead of continuing P0A.
v3.23 blocks normative package closure until the frozen Native thin-path / capability comparative evaluation records preserve_v3_23_semantics; semantic-change decisions require a successor candidate.
LAR-P0A-013 must freeze package_review_head, create the final manifest and append the manifest-closure review before approval eligibility.
v3.23 is only a baseline candidate; after a preserve_v3_23_semantics evaluation decision, required normative artifacts outside the final review closure remain missing.
The package is approval-eligible, but implementation remains blocked until an explicitly authorized, non-revoked BaselineApprovalRecord exists.
An approved baseline must be projected atomically into repository truth before implementation begins.
Every legacy mutation path must consume the shared ownership contract before the new runtime exists or claims work.
Implement the next ready P0D/P1 work item from the machine work-item graph.
All code slices exist, but fixed gates, crashes, migrations, backup/restore and conformance must pass before live qualification.
Implementation Acceptance does not admit P2; Full Q0 must bind the live platform, toolchain, model, profile and adapter behavior.
All prior gates are active; execute exactly one human-initiated low-risk commit-only pilot.
The single pilot is green; collect five scheduled self-host observations before any multi-repo expansion.
Scheduled self-host evidence is green; qualify two target repositories and run the fixed reliability and efficiency cohort.
The P4 cohort is green and LAR-P4-002 is the selected DAG work item; activate exactly one bounded data-only B3 portfolio generation without changing Epoch 1 capacity.
The cohort meets every hard gate and LAR-P5-001 is the selected DAG work item; perform guarded per-repository CAS cutover whether or not the independent B3 generation was activated.
All planned migration stages are complete; operate only within the approved runtime, qualification and Authorization generations.

selector_invariants: The selector is read-only and must not run release preflight or mutate state.
A passing planning verifier means the declared state is internally truthful, not that a later gate passed.
Historical archive and v3.22/v3.23 rebaseline actions are completed DAG history and are not selectable runtime actions.

Native thin-path evaluation is selected before normative closure until LAR-P0A-EVAL-002 records preserve_v3_23_semantics; narrow_profile_or_adapter_candidate and supersede_required freeze v3.23 and select create_successor_candidate_first.
run_baseline_consistency_review is selected only when current_work_item is LAR-P0A-013 and missing artifacts exactly match a declared review set.
activate_b3_portfolio_generation_first is selected only for LAR-P4-002 after a green P4 cohort; LAR-P5-001 remains independently selectable without B3 activation.
Unknown or inconsistent state returns repair_gate_first.
The selected action must be present in allowed_next_actions.
rollback_ref: Revert selector policy, selector implementation and planning-status together; do not alter runtime state.
